title: nasturtium affghanum
intro: Nasturtium affghanum, also known as Indian cress, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Brassicaceae family. It is a perennial herb that has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Nasturtium affghanum include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and treat digestive problems. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are commonly used to harness its medicinal properties.
